raw_consumer_statement:
A fraudulent charge of {$400.00} was posted to my credit card account on XX/XX/year> for a travel purchase neither myself nor my authorized cardholders madeXXXX XXXX I informed the credit card company immediately and opened a dispute for the transaction, and they issued a credit for {$400.00} and promptly cancelled the card number that was used for this fraudulent transaction, card ending in XXXXXXXX XXXX On XX/XX/XXXX, the charge of {$400.00} was REBILLED to my credit card account because the merchant provided documentation related to the transaction. XXXX Each page ( Pages 1-7 ) of the documentation provided by the merchant is attached to this complaint.XXXX Additionally, my credit card company included a letter explaining the merchant documentation as the reason they have closed the dispute and rebilled my account.
I have signed the statement on the letter confirming and attesting that this transaction was not made or authorized by me or my authorized cardholders and faxed the signed copy back to my credit card companyXXXX Furthermore, on page 2 of the merchant documentation, the email address " XXXX '' is not my email and the billing address is not provided and only a 5-digit zipcode is providedXXXX The customer names provided on the reservation ( page 6 ) of the merchant documentation is not my name or any person ( s ) I know.
Finally, the contact info under my name on page XXXX is not my phone number or my email.XXXXI have NEVER conducted business with XXXX XXXX XXXX at XXXX XXXX XXXX All of this is supporting evidence that my credit card account was used fraudulently.
I believe that the merchant 's only recourse is to contact XXXX and ultimately, FareHarbor.com is responsible for allowing the fraudulent online booking to go through.
